title: Verify Trademark Response
description: The brand-agent's authoritative answer on trademark ownership and licensing. Mirrors the shape of brand.json's #/definitions/trademark where status is `owned`, `licensed_in`, or `licensed_out`.

status.description: Verification status. Applicable values for this tool: owned, licensed_in, licensed_out, disputed, not_ours, unknown. (pending_review is uncommon — trademark registrations are public-record events with definitive ownership at any given time.)

matched_registration.description: Public — when status is `owned`, `licensed_in`, or `licensed_out`, the registration the agent matched the query to. Same shape as brand.json's #/definitions/trademark.

status.description: Registration status from the registry, distinct from this response's outer `status` field.

license_type.description: Public — licensing relationship when status is `owned`, `licensed_in`, or `licensed_out`. Redundant with status for owned/licensed_in/licensed_out; kept for parity with brand.json #/definitions/trademark.

licensor_domain.description: Public — when status is `licensed_in`, the domain of the entity licensing this mark to the brand.

countries.description: Public — ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 country codes the response covers.

nice_classes.description: Public — Nice Classification class numbers covered. Disambiguates cross-industry marks (Delta-airline class 39 vs Delta-faucet class 11).

use_case_authorization.description: Authorized-tier only. Per-use-case permission for this mark.

context_note.description: Public — free-text context the brand chooses to surface.
